name_en: Size 16 x 10 x 7.5CM Fully original channels inside and out! Vintage Denim series denim blue nano small size, compared to the same model in monogram fabric, it has a richer and fresher vintage flavor! Friends, take a look at the fabric details and study the hardware characteristics, I believe you will understand its worth after looking a few more times! First come, first served, this style is very popular.
